prompt: Look at evals/files/sample_transactions.csv and tell me which spending categories are the highest, and flag any unusual transactions. Also identify how spending splits between my two accounts.
expectations: Housing is identified as the largest expense category ($2,200)
Spending is broken down by account (Chase Checking vs Amex Gold)
At least one transaction is flagged as notable or unusual
Categories are ranked or sorted by total spend amount
Missing values or data quality issues are mentioned (even if none found)
